validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh: original git apply patch format was failing with corrupt patch error. Rewrote solve.sh to use Python string replacement instead, which applies the fix reliably.

p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass CI/CD checks: (1) test_repo_ruff_lint - ruff check passes on memory_utils.py; (2) test_repo_isort_check - import sorting passes with black profile; (3) test_repo_black_format - code formatting check passes; (4) test_repo_plugin_contracts - 33 plugin contract tests pass (1 pre-existing failure allowed); (5) test_repo_unit_trace_utils - trace_utils unit tests pass. All tested and working in Docker container on base commit.
